ques: Locate the latest report on BBC News about the impact of recent natural disasters in Asia and summarize the key points and areas affected.
answer: The latest BBC report is "'Once in 300 years' rain hits Thai city as floods ravage South East Asia" (26 Nov 2025). Record monsoon floods devastated South East Asia: in southern Thailand at least 33 died, 10 provinces were hit, Hat Yai saw its heaviest rain in 300 years (335mm/day), and over 2 million people were affected (Songkhla declared a disaster zone, navy deploying an aircraft-carrier "floating hospital"). Malaysia evacuated 19,000+ (Kelantan, Perlis) and Vietnam also suffered deadly flooding.
